title: Workhorse Expands W56 Electric Van Deployment in Minnesota with FedEx
text: North Star Courier became the first FedEx service provider outside South Carolina to expand W56 Electric Van Deployment operations, marking regional expansion of the FedEx partnership. Following the FedEx Forward Service Provider Summit where Workhorse was a Presidential Exhibitor, the company secured purchase orders from multiple independent service providers. Orders included 15 W56 step vans from FedEx, plus orders from three additional parcel delivery independent service providers for seven W56 electric step vans. The W56's zero-emission capability and impressive efficiency of 31 MPGe compared to 7 MPG for traditional delivery trucks make it an attractive option for fleet operators seeking to reduce emissions and operating costs.
